name: Equipment Handover Form
description: A formal document verifying the checkout or return of company equipment, materials, or assets.
content:
EQUIPMENT HANDOVER FORM

Date: {{formatDate handover_date}}

This document serves to confirm that the following equipment/asset(s) has/have been handed over by {{issued_by_name}} ("Issuer") and received by {{received_by_name}} ("Recipient").

The Recipient acknowledges receipt of the item(s) listed below in {{#if (eq condition 'Good Working Order')}}good working order and physical condition{{else}}the condition specified below{{/if}}.

Item(s) Description:

{{equipment_list}}
{{#if (eq condition 'Damaged / Missing Parts')}}

Known Damage / Missing Components:

{{damage_description}}
{{/if}} {{#if purpose_of_handover}}

Purpose of Handover: {{purpose_of_handover}}

{{/if}}

By signing below, the Recipient agrees to take full responsibility for the proper use and care of the aforementioned equipment until it is returned. Any loss or damage caused by negligence may result in repair or replacement costs being charged to the Recipient.

Issued By
Name: {{issued_by_name}}
{{#if issued_by_title}}Title: {{issued_by_title}}{{/if}}

Signature: _________________________

Received By
Name: {{received_by_name}}
{{#if received_by_title}}Title: {{received_by_title}}{{/if}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: equipment_list
fields.label: Equipment List
fields.placeholder:
Item - Make/Model - Serial No - Quantity
e.g., Laptop - Dell XPS 13 - SN:12345 - 1 Unit

fields.name: purpose_of_handover
fields.label: Purpose of Handover (Optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Remote work assignment, Repair, Return to IT
